instruct.example: The coach instructed us how to swim.
instruct.example_zh: 教練指導我們如何游泳。

instructor.example_zh: 我們的駕訓教練很有耐心。

insult.example: It is rude to insult others.
His words were an insult to me.
insult.example_zh: 他的話對我是一種侮辱。

intellectual.example_zh: 西洋棋是一種益智遊戲。

intellectual.example: The book was popular among intellectuals.
intellectual.example_zh: 這本書在知識分子間很受歡迎。

intelligence.example: Dolphins are known for their intelligence.

intend.example: I intend to study harder this year.

intense.example: The heat was intense at noon.

intensity.example: The intensity of the storm increased.

intensive.example: She took an intensive English course.
intensive.example_zh: 她上了一門密集英語課程。

intention.example: His intention was to help, not to hurt.
intention.example_zh: 他的本意是幫忙，而非傷害。

interact.example: Children learn by interacting with others.
interact.example_zh: 孩子透過與他人互動來學習。

interaction.example: There was a lot of interaction in class.

interfere.example: Please don't interfere in my work.

intermediate.example: She is at an intermediate level in English.

interpret.example: She interpreted the poem for us.
interpret.example_zh: 她為我們詮釋了這首詩。

interruption.example: He worked without interruption for hours.
interruption.example_zh: 他連續工作好幾個小時都沒被打擾。

intuition.example: Her intuition told her something was wrong.
intuition.example_zh: 她的直覺告訴她有些不對勁。

invasion.example: The country prepared for an invasion.
invasion.example_zh: 這個國家為入侵做準備。

invention.example: The wheel was an important invention.

invest.example: They invested money in a new shop.
invest.example_zh: 他們投資錢開了一家新店。

involve.example: The job involves a lot of travel.

isolation.example: He felt isolation living far from town.
isolation.example_zh: 住在離鎮很遠的地方讓他感到孤立。

issue.example: The school issued new ID cards.
issue.example_zh: 學校發放了新的識別證。

keen.example: She has a keen interest in science.
keen.example_zh: 她對科學有濃厚的興趣。

kettle.example: She boiled water in the kettle.

kneel.example: He knelt down to tie his shoe.

knob.example: Turn the knob to open the door.

labor.example: Building the wall took hard labor.
labor.example_zh: 砌這道牆耗費了大量勞力。
這家工廠需要更多人手。

laboratory-lab.example_zh: 科學家在實驗室裡工作。

lag.example: He lagged behind the rest of the group.
There is a lag between the sound and the video.
lag.example_zh: 聲音和畫面之間有延遲。

landmark.example: The tower is a famous landmark.
The discovery was a landmark in science.
landmark.example_zh: 這項發現是科學上的里程碑。

largely.example: His success was largely due to luck.
largely.example_zh: 他的成功主要歸功於運氣。

launch.example: They will launch a new product next week.
launch.example_zh: 他們下週將推出一項新產品。

launch.example: We watched the launch of the rocket.
launch.example_zh: 我們觀看了火箭的發射。

lawful.example: It is lawful to vote at eighteen.

lean.example: He leaned against the wall to rest.

learned.example: He is a learned and wise man.

lecture.example: We attended a lecture on history.
lecture.example_zh: 我們聽了一場歷史講座。

lecture.example: My mom lectured me about being late.
lecture.example_zh: 媽媽因我遲到而訓了我一頓。

lecturer.example: The lecturer spoke clearly and slowly.
lecturer.example_zh: 那位講師說得清楚又緩慢。

legend.example: There is an old legend about the lake.
legend.example_zh: 有一個關於這座湖的古老傳說。

legend.example: The singer is a music legend.
legend.example_zh: 那位歌手是樂壇的傳奇人物。

leisurely.example: We took a leisurely walk in the park.
leisurely.example_zh: 我們在公園裡悠閒地散步。

librarian.example: The librarian helped me find the book.
librarian.example_zh: 圖書館員幫我找到那本書。

license.example: You need a license to drive.
The shop is licensed to sell medicine.

lifeguard.example_zh: 救生員注視著游泳的人。

limitation.example_zh: 每個人都有自己的極限。

linen.example: The shirt is made of cool linen.
linen.example_zh: 這件襯衫是用涼爽的亞麻布做的。

lipstick.example: She wore red lipstick to the party.
lipstick.example_zh: 她擦了紅色口紅去派對。

liquor.example: The store cannot sell liquor to teens.
liquor.example_zh: 這家店不能把酒賣給青少年。

literary.example: She won a literary prize for her novel.
literary.example_zh: 她的小說贏得了一個文學獎。

loan.example: He took out a loan to buy a house.
The library loaned us the books.

lobster.example: We ate fresh lobster by the sea.
lobster.example_zh: 我們在海邊吃了新鮮的龍蝦。
